candidates.why: Includes short-term investments, which is broader than cash and cash equivalents.
Exact match for cash and cash equivalents on the balance sheet.
Cash flow item, not balance sheet cash balance.
Cash flow item, not balance sheet cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Cash Dividends Paid & Common Stock Buyback - Net
candidates.why: Cash flow item, not balance sheet cash balance.

variables.notes: Preferred pure cash line over broader cash plus short-term investments.

candidates.why: Header/group label for current liabilities, but not the reported total.
Only a component of current liabilities.
Only a detail/component line.
Explicit total current liabilities line on the balance sheet; best match for LCT.
Wrong liability class.
Wrong liability class and only a component.

candidates.row_label: Short-Term Debt & Current Portion of Long-Term Debt
candidates.why: Clean reported total for current debt/current portion of long-term debt; best single line for STD.
Likely only one component of current debt, excluding current portion of long-term debt.
Represents current maturities of long-term debt and may be a component if no clean total existed.

final_choice.row_label: Short-Term Debt & Current Portion of Long-Term Debt

variables.notes: Selected the clean total current debt line. Did not add component rows to avoid double counting. Although it includes capitalized leases in some periods via underlying detail, the reported total is still the best available shortlist match.

candidates.why: Explicit short-term income taxes payable/current tax liability line; best match for TXP.
Combined long- and short-term taxes payable; broader than current taxes payable.

variables.notes: No shortlist provided, but this exact current taxes payable label exists and is the correct balance-sheet match.
